markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Imubit to discuss content strategy, funnel development, and marketing alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/P_DJ7RF699d_8a1d5mPh4wu4YLC13xyf?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is developing an authority and lead generation funnel for Imubit, focusing on SEO-driven content across five industries](https://fathom.video/share/P_DJ7RF699d_8a1d5mPh4wu4YLC13xyf?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)
  - [Content strategy aims to build brand authority, pre-educate prospects, and generate warmer leads over time](https://fathom.video/share/P_DJ7RF699d_8a1d5mPh4wu4YLC13xyf?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
  - [Imubit is transitioning marketing leadership; GrowthX will align with new team members for content implementation](https://fathom.video/share/P_DJ7RF699d_8a1d5mPh4wu4YLC13xyf?tab=summary&timestamp=985.0)
  - [Performance metrics show GrowthX-produced articles are gaining traction, approaching the traffic of Imubit's existing blog](https://fathom.video/share/P_DJ7RF699d_8a1d5mPh4wu4YLC13xyf?tab=summary&timestamp=1334.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy and Funnel Development

  - [Two-step approach: 1) Build authority-generating, SEO-focused content, 2) Add lead capture elements (banners, exit-intent popups)](https://fathom.video/share/P_DJ7RF699d_8a1d5mPh4wu4YLC13xyf?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)
  - [Content aligns with four pillars, tied to Imubit's main benefits and industry landing pages](https://fathom.video/share/P_DJ7RF699d_8a1d5mPh4wu4YLC13xyf?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)
  - [Strategy aims to break objections before they arise, using writing guidelines based on top objections](https://fathom.video/share/P_DJ7RF699d_8a1d5mPh4wu4YLC13xyf?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)
  - [Emphasis on brand building and authority generation, with lead generation as a secondary goal](https://fathom.video/share/P_DJ7RF699d_8a1d5mPh4wu4YLC13xyf?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Content repurposing opportunities: webinars to articles, articles to LinkedIn posts](https://fathom.video/share/P_DJ7RF699d_8a1d5mPh4wu4YLC13xyf?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)

### Lead Quality and Sales Team Expectations

  - [Content leads differ from paid leads; may take 1-3 years to convert to customers](https://fathom.video/share/P_DJ7RF699d_8a1d5mPh4wu4YLC13xyf?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)
  - [Important to manage sales team expectations on lead quality and conversion timeline](https://fathom.video/share/P_DJ7RF699d_8a1d5mPh4wu4YLC13xyf?tab=summary&timestamp=1085.0)
  - [Content strategy builds brand awareness and educates prospects, making them "warmer" leads](https://fathom.video/share/P_DJ7RF699d_8a1d5mPh4wu4YLC13xyf?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

### Marketing Team Transition and Alignment

  - [Two director-level marketing hires expected in about a month](https://fathom.video/share/P_DJ7RF699d_8a1d5mPh4wu4YLC13xyf?tab=summary&timestamp=1006.0)
  - [Contractor named Maura is Team 201's main point of contact](https://fathom.video/share/P_DJ7RF699d_8a1d5mPh4wu4YLC13xyf?tab=summary&timestamp=1017.0)
  - [GrowthX can align directly with new team members for content implementation](https://fathom.video/share/P_DJ7RF699d_8a1d5mPh4wu4YLC13xyf?tab=summary&timestamp=1039.0)

### Content Performance and Optimization

  - [GrowthX-produced articles (/articles) approaching traffic levels of Imubit's existing blog (/blog)](https://fathom.video/share/P_DJ7RF699d_8a1d5mPh4wu4YLC13xyf?tab=summary&timestamp=1340.0)
  - [Discussion of leveraging Imubit's 100+ applications for content ideas](https://fathom.video/share/P_DJ7RF699d_8a1d5mPh4wu4YLC13xyf?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)
  - ["Demystifying AI" white paper identified as Imubit's best-performing asset](https://fathom.video/share/P_DJ7RF699d_8a1d5mPh4wu4YLC13xyf?tab=summary&timestamp=1406.0)

### Executive Guide Development

  - [Plan to create a "beautified download guide" as a PDF with Imubit branding](https://fathom.video/share/P_DJ7RF699d_8a1d5mPh4wu4YLC13xyf?tab=summary&timestamp=1475.0)
  - [Process: GrowthX drafts, Allison reviews, Tim approves, then sent to designer](https://fathom.video/share/P_DJ7RF699d_8a1d5mPh4wu4YLC13xyf?tab=summary&timestamp=1491.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Mariana to send Allison the content strategy document for review](https://fathom.video/share/P_DJ7RF699d_8a1d5mPh4wu4YLC13xyf?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Allison to provide a list of Imubit's applications (generalized and anonymized) for content ideation](https://fathom.video/share/P_DJ7RF699d_8a1d5mPh4wu4YLC13xyf?tab=summary&timestamp=1168.0)
  - [Mariana to publish two more approved articles](https://fathom.video/share/P_DJ7RF699d_8a1d5mPh4wu4YLC13xyf?tab=summary&timestamp=1537.0)
  - [GrowthX to continue drafting the executive guide for review](https://fathom.video/share/P_DJ7RF699d_8a1d5mPh4wu4YLC13xyf?tab=summary&timestamp=1444.0)
  - [Allison to add Maura (contractor) to the Slack channel for coordination](https://fathom.video/share/P_DJ7RF699d_8a1d5mPh4wu4YLC13xyf?tab=summary&timestamp=1050.0)
